name: Mekaal Hasan Band
description:
'''Mekaal Hasan Band''' ({{Langx|ur|میکال حسن بینڈ}}), sometimes shortened to MHB, is a [[progressive rock]] band, founded in 2001 by the [[Pakistan|Pakistani]] guitarist, composer and producer, Mekaal Hasan. 
The Mekaal Hasan Band is known for being innovators of a progressive style of music which finds its melodic roots in South Asian traditional musical and literary art forms, some of which include [[Qawwali|Qawali]], Sufiana Kalam and traditional material from [[Culture of India|Indian]] and [[Culture of Pakistan|Pakistani culture]] and folkloric traditions. This also led to the formation of a super group called Mekaalians led by Wazir Taqi and Najeeb Ur Rehman from [[Islamabad]]. 

Formed in [[Lahore]], Pakistan in 2001 by Mekaal Hasan, the band comprises a revolving cast of Pakistani and International artists/musicians/visual artists and creators.

The band's music is rooted to [[Culture of South Asia|South Asian culture]], while managing to communicate to modern audiences in contemporary musical settings. The band members have roots in different genres, including [[Jazz]], Indian/Pakistani traditional classical, 70's Progressive Rock, Old School [[RnB]], 70's [[Funk]] and [[Soul music|Soul]].
